svg.title: Search-and-Rescue Behavior Tree
svg.desc: Root Selector with two children: Patrol Sequence and NavigateToBase action. Patrol Sequence has five children: ZonesRemaining condition, NavigateToZone action, DetectSurvivor action, HandleDetection Selector, AdvanceZone action. HandleDetection Selector has two children: SurvivorFound Sequence and LogNoDetection action. SurvivorFound Sequence has three children: IsSurvivorDetected condition, BroadcastSurvivorTF action, NotifyBase action.
